metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1778
metadata.comment: Rationale: To detect beta-catenin, the authors used mouse mAb 5H10 or rabbit polyclonal antibodies (Shibamoto et al., 1995). beta-catenin selective monoclonal antibody is used in immunoperoxidase and immunogold labelling of cerebellum and cortex. The authors highlighted recruitment to symmetrical pre- and post synaptic adherence apposition that tend to border release site. They also show early developmental recruitment of this symmetrical adhesive structures prior to synaptic vesicle clustering.. Experimental description: Materials and methods. "For adult mice those older than 1 mo were used.........The days when the animals were born was regarded as postnatal day 0. The study also used chicken tissue but figures for the annotation involved mouse tissue.

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
